title: Evidence Record
description: An individual evidence record feeding the color · validator chain · Tribunal. Each record cites a source · a source weight (per EntityScorer · 0-1) · a timestamp · cross-source confirmations · the raw snapshot key (in object storage).

source.description: Named source · EDGAR · CompStak · ATTOM · OpenAlex · Brave · etc.

source_weight.description: EntityScorer-assigned weight · EDGAR 0.90 · OpenAlex 0.85 · CRE News 0.65 · Reddit 0.50

timestamp.description: When the evidence was captured (NOT when the underlying event happened)

event_timestamp.description: Optional · when the underlying event (a filing · a sale · a permit) occurred

staleness_days.description: Days since this evidence was captured · drives staleness_penalty

cross_source_confirmations.description: Number of independent sources that independently confirm the same fact

raw_snapshot_key.description: Object storage key (Tigris / S3) for the raw captured payload · evidence-vault bucket

extracted_claim.description: The specific claim this evidence supports

captured_by.description: Agent ENS or human operator who captured the evidence
